detail: Phase 3 continued — building agent OS infrastructure
Worker lifecycle manager built + tested. settle-agent and financial-management-agent active with heartbeats.
Created agent_state_schema.sql — Supabase shared state bucket with views for active_agents and silent_agents
SaaS Admin security fixes: wired security headers (dead code→live), PII redaction in logger, audit context in error handler, all 0 type errors

Session complete: Agent OS infrastructure built (developers, live logging, credential scoping, worker lifecycle, state bucket), Phase 3 security fixes applied to SaaS Admin, Customer Portal auth guards wired, SETTLE scrapers recovered + committed, Financial Mgmt live on :3011, 4 services now runnable.
Agent-native verification system built — replaces GitHub Actions CI/CD. verify.py runs typecheck+lint+tests inline per service. 11 services configured.
CONNECT service: fixed config (pooler URL, auth bypass dev mode), resolved import errors, removed emoji crashes, created start_connect.bat. Boots on :8003. DB needs pooler DNS fix.
VERIFY service running :8004. Fixed SQLAlchemy metadata conflict, RedirectResponse import, optional DB config. start_verify.bat created. 8 services now runnable.
Session complete: 12 services runnable, agent OS operational, all repos committed
